title: Transferring Save Games
requirements: The Homebrew Channel on both the source and destination systems
An SD card or USB drive, FAT32 formatted
_note: Moves save data between two Wii (or Wii/vWii) consoles using SaveGame Manager GX. Create a fresh save for each game on the destination console first — you're importing into an existing save slot, not creating one from scratch.

steps.title: Before you start
steps.body:
You'll use the same tool, **SaveGame Manager GX**, on both consoles — first to **extract** saves from the source Wii, then to **install** them on the destination Wii.

First, let's check your SD card or USB drive is FAT32.

steps.title: Put SaveGame Manager GX on your SD card
steps.body: Graphite downloads **SaveGame Manager GX** and unpacks it into the `apps` folder on your SD card, ready to launch from the Homebrew Channel.

steps.title: Clean up and eject the card
steps.body:
macOS scatters hidden junk files (`.DS_Store`, `._` files) onto SD cards, and Wii homebrew can choke on them.

Press the button, and Graphite strips those files off the card and **safely ejects it for you**. Once it pops off, pull the card out.

steps.title: Extract saves from the source console
steps.body:
Put the SD card or USB drive into the **source** Wii and power it on.

1. Open the **Homebrew Channel** and launch **SaveGame Manager GX**.
2. Make sure the source is set to **Wii**.
3. Find the save you want to copy, select it, choose **Extract**, then **Default**.
4. Repeat for every save you want to move.
5. Press **HOME** to exit.

steps.title: Create matching saves on the destination console
steps.body: Move the SD card or USB drive to the **destination** Wii. Before importing anything, launch each game you're transferring a save for and let it create a **fresh save file** — SaveGame Manager GX installs into an existing save slot, it doesn't create the game's save structure from scratch.

steps.title: Install the saves on the destination console
steps.body:
1. Open the **Homebrew Channel** and launch **SaveGame Manager GX**.
2. Make sure the source is set to your SD card or USB drive.
3. Select each extracted save and choose **Install**.

steps.title: You're done
steps.body: Your saves are now on the destination console, with progress intact. If a save doesn't load correctly, double check you created a fresh save for that exact game on the destination console before installing.
